---
name: New Skill Request
about: Request a new DevOps skill plugin (e.g., Terraform, AWS, Docker)
title: "[Skill] "
labels: new-skill
---

**Skill name**
e.g., terraform-skills, aws-skills, docker-skills

**What should it cover?**
List the key topics and workflows this skill should include.

**Priority areas**
Which areas would be most valuable to your team?

**References**
Any existing tools, docs, or plugins that could serve as inspiration.
